name: page
description: PAGE — Plugin Authoring for Grounded Education. A meta-plugin that provides the framework, process, and supervision for creating educational plugins and skill sets. Guides an author from intent interview through framework grounding, pipeline architecture, dual-harness scaffolding, skill drafting with independent review, TDD-style testing, release hygiene, and post-pilot reflection. Distills the lessons learned building POSED (github.com/maxuwp/posed) and p2d (github.com/maxuwp/p2d).

interface.shortDescription: Framework, process, and supervision for building educational plugins.

defaultPrompt: Start a new educational plugin with @page
Ground my pipeline stages in established frameworks with @page-grounding
Run the TDD pass on a drafted skill with @page-test
